text: The minimalist, open space feels quiet and expectant—like a pause before some unseen event. In the first scene, I sit low to the ground, near modern furniture and soft beanbags, nearly erased by sterile clarity. Moving into the second scene, I am enveloped by visual ideas—words about research and development, possibility, and the dance of human and machine. I feel a sense of curiosity mingled with mild containment, aware of how this space reflects the interplay of thought, design, and aspiration.
